headline: Everything your business needs to launch a website fast
subheadline: One simple subscription covers website design, setup, hosting, SEO foundations, and support for small businesses that want to get online quickly.

items.title: Custom Website Design
items.description: A unique, modern business website designed around your service, offers, and brand identity.

items.title: Hosting Included
items.description: Your website runs on fast, reliable infrastructure with no extra hosting cost and no server management.

items.title: Mobile-First
items.description: Your small business website looks polished on phone, tablet, and desktop from day one.

items.title: SEO-Ready
items.description: Built with the structure, metadata, and crawl signals needed for Google and AI search tools to understand your business.

items.title: Lightning Fast
items.description: Optimized for speed because fast-loading websites earn more trust, rank better, and convert more visitors.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.description: We keep your site secure and running. Updates included in Growth and Priority plans.
